problem id: 98bbac0f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01001110 -> 10010011
  01000000 -> 00010000
  10101111 -> 01101011
  11011000 -> 00110110
  10110101 -> 01101101
  01100011 -> 01011000
  11111101 -> 01111111
  01000010 -> 10010000
  11111001 -> 01111110

query: 10101101
predicted answer: 01101011
